filter.title: Filter Photos
filter.semanticSearchDegraded: Semantic search is unavailable. Keyword search is being used.

error.copyNotSupported: Copy not supported in this browser

stats.noPhotosTip: No photos yet, upload some now!

album.noPhotosTip: No photos in this album yet
album.emptyAlbumDescription: More wonderful moments will be presented here.
album.failedToLoadDescription: An error occurred while loading this album.

livePhoto.mobile: Long press to play live photos · Double-click or pinch zoom

hint.desktop: Double-click or zoom with the mouse wheel

error.title: Reaction Failed
error.rateLimited: Too many requests, please try again later

flash.offDidNotFireReturnNotDetected: Off, Did not fire, Return not detected
flash.firedRedEyeReductionReturnNotDetected: Fired, Red-eye reduction, Return not detected
flash.onRedEyeReductionReturnNotDetected: On, Red-eye reduction, Return not detected
flash.autoDidNotFireRedEyeReduction: Auto, Did not fire, Red-eye reduction
flash.autoFiredRedEyeReductionReturnNotDetecte: Auto, Fired, Red-eye reduction, Return not detected
flash.autoFiredRedEyeReductionReturnDetected: Auto, Fired, Red-eye reduction, Return detected

errors.invalidPassword: Password must be at least 6 characters

loginFailed.title: Login Failed
loginFailed.description: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

invalid.title: Invitation unavailable
invalid.description: This invitation is invalid, expired, revoked, or already used.

errors.username: Username must be at least 2 characters
errors.password: Password must be at least 6 characters

block.title: File Already Exists
block.message: Photo "{fileName}" already exists and duplicate uploads are not allowed
block.suggestion: You can: 1) Rename the file and upload again; 2) Switch to "warn mode" in settings to allow overwriting

skip.title: Duplicate File Skipped
skip.message: Photo "{fileName}" already exists and has been automatically skipped

warn.title: Duplicate File Detected
warn.message: Photo "{fileName}" already exists. Continuing will overwrite the existing photo

uploadFailed.title: Upload Failed
uploadFailed.message: An error occurred during upload, please try again later

photos.title: Photo Upload
photos.subtitle: Photos will be automatically processed and added to your library. You can organize your photos in the {0} section afterwards.
photos.supportedFormats: JPEG / PNG / HEIC / RAW / Live Photo / Motion Photo

uploader.label: Drag and drop or click to select photos
uploader.description: Supports JPEG, PNG, HEIC, and RAW format photos, plus MOV format Live Photo videos. Maximum file size: {maxSize}MB per file

slideover.title: Upload Photos
slideover.description: Drag and drop or select files. Photos will be automatically processed and added to the library.

eraseLocation.label: Erase location info on upload
eraseLocation.description: This upload can override the system default and be toggled on or off anytime.

duplicateCheck.label: Duplicate file strategy
duplicateCheck.descriptionEnabled: Duplicate detection is enabled and same-name files will follow the selected handling mode.
duplicateCheck.descriptionDisabled: Duplicate detection is disabled and same-name files will continue directly through upload.

single.title: Delete Photo
single.message: Are you sure you want to delete this photo?

batch.title: Batch Delete Photos
batch.message: Are you sure you want to delete {count} selected photos?

delete.warning: Deleting the photo will remove the original, thumbnail and live photo video, and cannot be undone.

livePhotoModal.title: Live Photo: {title}
livePhotoModal.notSupported: Your browser does not support video playback

messages.batchReprocessSuccess: Successfully submitted {count} photos to the reanalysis queue
messages.batchRebuildVariantsSuccess: Submitted {count} photos to the image version rebuild queue
messages.batchSelectRequired: Please select at least one photo for this operation
messages.noStorageKey: Unable to process: missing storage information
messages.batchNoStorageKey: {count} photos are missing storage information and cannot be processed
messages.batchNoUrl: No photos with download URLs available
messages.batchPartialUrl: Only {count} out of {total} photos have download URLs available
messages.batchDownloadPartial: Batch download completed with some failures
messages.livePhotoLoadError: Unable to load Live Photo information
messages.eraseLocationFailed: Failed to queue erase location info task
messages.batchEraseLocationFailed: Failed to queue batch erase-location tasks
messages.mlAutoTagsFailed: Failed to queue AI tag extraction
messages.aiAnalysisFailed: Failed to queue AI image analysis

errors.allFilesTooLarge: All {count} selected files exceed the maximum size limit ({maxSize}MB).
errors.filesTooLargeSkipped: Skipped {count} oversized file(s) (limit {maxSize}MB). Remaining files will continue uploading.
errors.filesUnsupportedSkipped: Skipped {count} file(s) with unsupported formats. Remaining files will continue uploading.
errors.unsupportedFormat: Unsupported file format: {type}. Please select JPEG, PNG, or HEIC photos, or MOV format Live Photo videos.
errors.uploadNetworkError: Network connection failed or CORS error. Please check network and storage configuration.
errors.uploadCorsError: CORS request failed. Please check storage CORS configuration.
errors.taskStatusCheckFailed: Failed to check task status. Please refresh the page and try again.

editModal.title: Edit photo details
editModal.description: Update the title, description, tags and shooting location.

fields.title: Title
fields.tagsHint: Press Enter to add each tag.
fields.locationHint: Click on the map to set the shooting location.
fields.ratingHint: Click on the stars to set the photo rating (0-5 stars).

alerts.longProcessing: Large files may take longer to process, which is expected.

people.title: People
people.description: People are created from face detection and clustering after AI analysis.
people.empty: No face albums yet. Run AI analysis and face clustering first.
people.noPhotos: No photos are linked to this person.

albums.title: Album Management
albums.subtitle: Create and manage your photo albums
albums.noAlbumsTip: Create your first album to organize your photos

form.title: Title
form.isHiddenHint: Photos in hidden albums are not shown on the home page

create.title: Create Album
create.description: Create a new album to organize your photos

delete.title: Delete Album
delete.message: Are you sure you want to delete the album "{title}"? Deleting the album will not delete the photos inside, only the album itself.

maintenance.description: Run destructive administrator maintenance tasks for generated data.

aiCleanup.title: AI data cleanup
aiCleanup.description: Remove generated AI indexes and face artifacts so they can be rebuilt cleanly.
aiCleanup.warningTitle: This permanently deletes generated AI data
aiCleanup.warningDescription: Photos are not deleted. Semantic vectors, face vectors, generated face crops, AI descriptions, unedited people, and completed or failed AI queue tasks can be removed.
aiCleanup.userIdError: Enter a positive numeric user ID
aiCleanup.protectionNote: Named, favorite, or manually edited people are preserved.

deletes.queueTasks: Completed or failed AI queue tasks

messages.partialSuccess: AI data cleanup finished with warnings

delete.title: Delete user
delete.description: This permanently deletes {username}, their albums, photos, and stored files.

restrictions.self: You cannot delete your own account.
restrictions.lastAdmin: You cannot delete the last active administrator.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Manage your public homepage and display information.

publicLink.title: Public homepage link
publicLink.enabled: Your homepage is visible to anyone with this link.

access.noAccess: Sorry, you do not have access to this page.

slogan.label: Slogan
slogan.help: The slogan displayed below the title on the homepage

author.label: Owner
author.description: The owner name of the instance

avatarUrl.label: Avatar URL
avatarUrl.description: Link to the owner's avatar image
avatarUrl.help: The avatar is displayed on the loading page and homepage

theme.label: Theme
theme.help: Users can override this in their own browsers

maxFileSize.label: Max Upload File Size
maxFileSize.description: Maximum size of a single uploaded file (MB)
maxFileSize.help: Takes effect immediately and applies to all users

enabled.label: Detect duplicate files on upload
enabled.description: Detect duplicate photos by filename and apply the selected strategy
enabled.help: When disabled, duplicate pre-check is skipped and files with the same name continue through upload

mode.label: Duplicate file handling mode
mode.description: How to handle files detected as duplicates
mode.help: Only effective when duplicate detection is enabled

base.title: Basics
base.description: Enable AI features and configure the local service entry point.

vision.title: Vision understanding
vision.description: Configure the vision model used for image understanding, auto tags, and AI descriptions.

semantic.title: Semantic search
semantic.description: Configure Jina embeddings for photo vectors and advanced search.

face.title: Face albums
face.description: Configure face extraction, people albums, and similar-face grouping.

vector.title: Vector store
vector.description: Configure the Qdrant connection and vector namespace.

actions.title: Maintenance actions
actions.description: Check AI service availability or requeue existing photos.

language.label: AI output language
language.description: Language used for automatic tags, AI descriptions, and photo critique
language.help: This does not change the interface language or map geocoding language.

enabled.label: Enable machine learning
enabled.description: Use ChronoFrame AI services for automatic tags, semantic search, and face albums
enabled.help: Requires PostgreSQL, Qdrant, and LocalAI. External VLM settings are only needed when using an external vision provider.

vlmProvider.label: Vision provider
vlmProvider.description: Provider used for image understanding and automatic tags

vlmBaseUrl.label: VLM API base URL
vlmBaseUrl.description: Base URL for an OpenAI-compatible chat completions service
vlmBaseUrl.help: The client calls /chat/completions under this base URL

vlmApiKey.label: VLM API key
vlmApiKey.help: Stored as a secret system setting

vlmModel.label: VLM model
vlmModel.description: Model used for image understanding and automatic tags

descriptions.qwen3Vl2b: Light local vision-language model for smaller GPUs.
descriptions.qwen3Vl8b: Higher quality local vision-language model with more VRAM use.
descriptions.qwen3Vl2bThinking: Reasoning variant for local visual analysis.
descriptions.qwen3Vl8bThinking: Higher quality reasoning variant for local visual analysis.

vectorProvider.label: Vector provider
vectorProvider.description: External vector database used for semantic and face embeddings

vectorBaseUrl.label: Vector store URL
vectorBaseUrl.description: Internal URL of the Qdrant service
vectorBaseUrl.help: Use http://chronoframe-qdrant:6333 for the bundled Docker service

vectorApiKey.label: Vector store API key
vectorApiKey.help: Leave empty for the bundled local Qdrant service

vectorCollectionPrefix.label: Collection prefix
vectorCollectionPrefix.description: Prefix for Qdrant collections created by ChronoFrame
vectorCollectionPrefix.help: Changing this creates a separate vector namespace

faceModel.label: Face model
faceModel.description: LocalAI model used to detect, embed, and cluster faces
faceModel.help: Buffalo-L is more accurate but research/testing only. Use OpenCV or YuNet/SFace for commercial-safe deployments. Switch GPU/CPU with LOCALAI_IMAGE.

minScore.label: Minimum tag score
minScore.description: Tags below this confidence score are ignored

enabled.label: Enable semantic search
enabled.description: Search photos by meaning instead of filename only

enabled.label: Enable face albums
enabled.description: Automatically group similar faces into a dedicated people album
enabled.help: When enabled, new face clustering tasks can be queued after uploads

threshold.label: Face cluster threshold
threshold.description: Similarity threshold used when grouping faces
threshold.help: Higher values create stricter, smaller face groups

enabled.label: Enable OCR indexing
enabled.description: Reserve OCR indexing for searchable text in images

actions.embeddingRequired: Semantic search requires a Jina base URL, API key, and model
actions.embeddingImageModelRequired: Photo semantic search requires a Jina image embedding model, for example jina-embeddings-v5-omni-small
actions.enqueueFailed: Failed to queue machine learning task

modelBrowser.title: LocalAI model gallery
modelBrowser.description: Preview and install models through LocalAI's official gallery APIs.
modelBrowser.empty: No models loaded. Search or load the LocalAI gallery.
modelBrowser.applyFailed: Failed to request LocalAI model install
modelBrowser.jobsFailed: Failed to load LocalAI model jobs
modelBrowser.jobStillRunning: LocalAI is still processing the install task. Refresh jobs later.
modelBrowser.jobPollFailed: Failed to track the LocalAI install task
modelBrowser.jobPollRetrying: Unable to read the LocalAI job status yet. Retrying.
modelBrowser.jobIdMissing: LocalAI did not return a job ID. Refresh jobs or check LocalAI logs.
modelBrowser.jobInvalid: LocalAI returned an empty install task and did not identify a model entry.
modelBrowser.jobCancelled: LocalAI model install task was cancelled.
modelBrowser.jobCompletedWithoutArtifact: LocalAI reported completion but did not report a downloaded artifact for {model}. Refresh models or check LocalAI logs.

localAiBaseUrl.label: LocalAI URL
localAiBaseUrl.description: LocalAI service URL for local face, VLM, and embedding models
localAiBaseUrl.help: The built-in Docker service uses http://chronoframe-localai:8080

enabled.label: Generate AI description and critique
enabled.description: Use the VLM to generate photo descriptions, critiques, and summaries
enabled.help: Only queues work when enabled; existing results are retained when disabled.

embeddingBaseUrl.label: Jina embedding base URL
embeddingBaseUrl.description: Jina AI embedding API base URL
embeddingBaseUrl.help: ChronoFrame calls /embeddings under this base URL

embeddingApiKey.label: Jina API key
embeddingApiKey.description: API key for Jina AI embeddings
embeddingApiKey.help: Required when semantic search is enabled

embeddingModel.label: Semantic embedding model
embeddingModel.description: Jina multimodal embedding model used for photo vectors and text query vectors
embeddingModel.help: Enter the Jina model name manually

ml.sectionDescription: Configure auto tags, semantic search, face albums, AI descriptions, and local or external model services.

webglImageViewerDebug.label: WebGL Image Viewer debug mode
webglImageViewerDebug.description: Control whether the WebGL image viewer shows debug info in production
webglImageViewerDebug.help: When enabled, logged-in users can view the WebGL debug panel in any environment; when disabled, debug info is shown only in development

enabled.label: Enable GitHub login
enabled.description: Whether to enable GitHub OAuth login

clientId.label: GitHub Client ID
clientId.description: Client ID of your GitHub OAuth app

clientSecret.label: GitHub Client Secret
clientSecret.description: Client Secret of your GitHub OAuth app

enabled.label: Enable OIDC login
enabled.description: Whether to enable a generic OpenID Connect login provider

label.label: OIDC Button Label
label.description: Display label for the OIDC login button

issuer.label: OIDC Issuer
issuer.description: Issuer URL used for OpenID Connect discovery

clientId.label: OIDC Client ID
clientId.description: Client ID of your OIDC application

clientSecret.label: OIDC Client Secret
clientSecret.description: Client secret of your OIDC application

clientAuthMethod.label: OIDC Client Auth Method
clientAuthMethod.description: How ChronoFrame authenticates to the token endpoint

system.sectionDescription: Configure system-level behavior parameters. Changes here will affect global upload and service behavior.

token.label: Mapbox Token
token.help: Should use a token without domain restrictions

token.label: MapTiler Token
token.help: MapLibre uses the free map service provider MapTiler by default

map.sectionDescription: Configure map display and geocoding services. The map provider affects map styles and access credentials.

language.label: Location Language
language.help: Choose the language for reverse geocoding photo locations. Default is English.

token.label: Mapbox Token
token.help: When configured, this will replace Nominatim as the location service

baseUrl.label: Nominatim Base URL
baseUrl.description: Base URL for Nominatim reverse geocoding API
baseUrl.help: Leave empty to use the public Nominatim service by default

autoEraseLocation.label: Automatically erase location info on upload
autoEraseLocation.description: Automatically remove EXIF GPS metadata and clear geolocation fields while processing uploaded photos
autoEraseLocation.help: When enabled, location erasure will run asynchronously in the processing queue

privacy.sectionDescription: Manage data privacy policies for photo uploads. It is recommended to enable location data removal on public sites.

name.label: Provider Name
name.description: Name of the storage provider configuration

local.label: Local Storage
local.description: Store photos directly on the server's filesystem.

s3.label: S3 Compatible
s3.description: Use AWS S3, Cloudflare R2, or other S3-compatible services.

openlist.label: OpenList
openlist.description: Connect to an Alist or OpenList instance for storage.

bucket.label: Bucket Name
bucket.description: S3 bucket name for storing photos

region.label: Region
region.description: AWS region for the S3 bucket

endpoint.label: S3 Endpoint
endpoint.description: Custom S3-compatible endpoint URL (e.g., for MinIO)

prefix.label: Storage Prefix
prefix.description: Prefix path for objects in the bucket

cdnUrl.label: CDN URL
cdnUrl.description: Custom CDN URL for accessing images

accessKeyId.label: Access Key ID
accessKeyId.description: AWS Access Key ID or equivalent

secretAccessKey.label: Secret Access Key
secretAccessKey.description: AWS Secret Access Key or equivalent

forcePathStyle.label: Force Path Style
forcePathStyle.description: Use path-style URLs instead of virtual-hosted-style

maxKeys.label: Max Keys
maxKeys.description: Maximum number of keys to retrieve per request

basePath.label: Storage Base Path
basePath.description: Local filesystem path for storing photos

baseUrl.label: Base URL
baseUrl.description: Public URL base for accessing stored photos

prefix.label: Storage Prefix
prefix.description: Prefix path for organizing photos in storage

baseUrl.label: OpenList Base URL
baseUrl.description: Base URL of the OpenList server

rootPath.label: Root Path
rootPath.description: Root path for storing photos in OpenList

metaEndpoint.label: Meta Endpoint
metaEndpoint.description: API endpoint for retrieving file metadata (default: /api/fs/get)

pathField.label: Path Field Name
pathField.description: Parameter name for file path in API requests (default: path)

cdnUrl.label: CDN URL
cdnUrl.description: Custom CDN URL for accessing images

storage.sectionDescription: Manage the default storage scheme and available storage providers. Settings on this page only affect subsequent file uploads.

changeModal.title: Change Storage Scheme
changeModal.alertDescription: Files uploaded after changing the storage scheme will be stored in the new scheme. Files already in the original scheme will not be migrated.

general.description: Manage the site's basic information and display appearance. Changes will immediately affect the dashboard and public-facing display.

mapbox.label: Mapbox
mapbox.description: High-performance maps with rich styling options.

maplibre.label: MapLibre
maplibre.description: Open-source fork of Mapbox GL JS.

welcome.title: Welcome to ChronoFrame
welcome.description: Follow the wizard to set up your gallery in a few minutes.
welcome.intro: ChronoFrame is a versatile personal gallery app. Before uploading photos, we need to configure a few essentials:

admin.title: Admin Account
admin.description: Used to sign in to the admin console

storage.title: Storage
storage.description: Store your photos locally or in the cloud

map.title: Map Service
map.description: Visualize locations and mark shooting spots

welcome.privacyNotice: ChronoFrame does not collect any of your data.

storage.title: Storage
storage.description: Choose where your photos are stored

map.title: Map Service
map.description: Configure map service for globe view and photo minimap

complete.title: Almost Done!
complete.description: Your ChronoFrame gallery is ready to use.
complete.body: You have completed all essential setup steps. You can now sign in with your admin account and start uploading photos.

analysis.annotationDescription: View geographic distribution by shooting parameters

localMapCoverage.title: Offline map coverage is limited
localMapCoverage.description: Your photo locations are outside the current local PMTiles package. Pins still work, but the base map may look empty until you add regional or global map data.

viewer.displayImageDownloadFailed: Failed to download current display image

rawVersions.title: RAW versions
rawVersions.reloadFailed: Failed to reload the updated photo
rawVersions.cannotDeletePrimary: Switch to another primary image before deleting this version

aiAnalysis.title: AI Image Analysis
aiAnalysis.empty: No AI analysis yet. Regenerate it when needed.
